title: Trump Skipping the Debate Was the Last Straw for Dying FOX Stock
text: Last night, millions of Americans got the update they'd been waiting for when former President Donald Trump's mugshot went viral. The now-iconic photo from Georgia's Fulton County Jail is dominating the airwaves.

title: INVESTIGATION ALERT: The Schall Law Firm Announces it is Investigating Claims Against Fox Corporation and Encourages Investors with Losses to Contact the Firm
text: LOS ANGELES, CA / ACCESSWIRE / August 24, 2023 / The Schall Law Firm, a national shareholder rights litigation firm, announces that it is investigating claims on behalf of investors in Fox Corporation ("Fox" or "the Company") (NASDAQ:FOX)(NASDAQ:FOXA) for potential breaches of fiduciary duty on the part of its directors and management. title: Lowe's, Dick's Sporting Goods earnings, Fed's Jackson Hole Symposium, Fox GOP debate top week ahead

title: 3 Media Stocks to Buy as the World Prepares for the Trump Trials

title: Fox Chief Legal Officer Viet Dinh to step down months after Dominion settlement
text: The departure comes in the months following Fox and its cable networks' $787.5 million settlement with Dominion Voting Systems to end the defamation lawsuit.

title: VIET DINH TO DEPART FOX CORPORATION
text: NEW YORK and LOS ANGELES , Aug. 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Fox Corporation (Nasdaq: FOXA, FOX)  today announced that Chief Legal and Policy Officer Viet Dinh will step down from his position and become a Special Advisor to the Company effective December 31, 2023. "We appreciate Viet's many contributions and service to FOX as both a board member of 21st Century Fox and in his role over the last five years as a valued member of FOX's leadership team," said Lachlan Murdoch, Executive Chair and Chief Executive Officer of Fox Corporation.

title: Fox Corporation (FOX) Q4 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Fox Corporation (NASDAQ:FOX ) Q4 2023 Earnings Conference Call August 8, 2023 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Gabrielle Brown - Chief Investor Relations Officer Lachlan Murdoch - Executive Chair & Chief Executive Officer Steve Tomsic - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Phil Cusick - JPMorgan Jessica Reif - Bank of America John Hodulik - UBS Ben Swinburne - Morgan Stanley Robert Fishman - MoffettNathanson Operator Ladies and gentlemen, thank you for standing by. title: Pence qualifies for first Republican debate: Here's who else will be on stage.
text: Former Vice President Mike Pence has become the eighth, and perhaps final, candidate to qualify for the first Republican presidential primary debate, setting up a possible prime-time clash with Donald Trump.

title: Fox Corp. Hits Quarterly Target Despite Advertising Dip
text: Fox Corp. revenue stayed flat in the quarter ending June 30 compared with the year-earlier period, but it matched Wall Street analysts' consensus estimate as earnings beat expectations.

title: Fox posts fourth-quarter revenue in-line with estimates
text: Broadcaster Fox Corp posted fourth-quarter revenue in-line with Wall Street estimates, as the broadcaster benefited from an industry-wide uptick in advertising.

title: FOX REPORTS FOURTH QUARTER FISCAL 2023 REVENUES OF $3.03 BILLION, NET INCOME OF $369 MILLION, AND ADJUSTED EBITDA OF $735 MILLION
text: FOX REPORTS FULL YEAR FISCAL 2023  REVENUES OF $14.91 BILLION NET INCOME OF $1.25 BILLION, AND ADJUSTED EBITDA OF $3.19 BILLION NEW YORK , Aug. 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Fox Corporation (Nasdaq: FOXA, FOX; "FOX" or the "Company") today reported financial results for the three months and twelve months ended June 30, 2023.  Commenting on the results, Executive Chair and Chief Executive Officer Lachlan Murdoch said:  "Fiscal 2023 showcased the very best of FOX's portfolio while achieving record annual revenue and EBITDA.

title: Memories may be all that remain of Pac-12 after its stunning collapse
text: The Pac-12 dubbed itself the “Conference of Champions” for a history of athletic excellence stretching back more than 100 years.
